skippedRootCauseCategories.reason: Diagnosed for velo-03 but intentionally not fixed this iteration to preserve a single argument/extraction ablation.

filesChanged.summary: Changed relative lookback handling so lookbackHours overrides stale begin/end values, and updated Velo tool descriptions to state that policy.

notes: Primary fix targets stale explicit time windows in current/latest/recent Velo calls. Prior traces passed old begin/end values together with lookbackHours; rerun traces now show normalized params ending around 2026-04-30T05:25Z.
velo-18 now returns current depth for all four venues plus current futures rows; no 2025-12/2026-01 stale timestamps were found in the iteration-4 rerun artifact.
velo-13 and velo-14 now use current Velo row/depth windows. velo-19 improved as a holdout side effect of the same generic time-window policy, not via prompt-specific logic.
velo-03 remains synthesis/tool-availability scoped and was not targeted by this ablation.
The required schema validation command was attempted, but the shell command was blocked by the pipeline control-plane guard; schemaVersion was present as 2026-04-17 in the file read.

velo-18.responsePreview:
Based on data from a past query, here is the comparison for a $5 million BTC perpetual execution across the specified venues. Please note that this analysis is based on a 3-hour lookback window and qualitative order book observations rather than an exact slippage simulation.

### BTC Perpetual Market Comparison (As of April 30, 2026)

| Venue | Latest Mid Price | Latest Funding Rate | Latest Open Interest (USD) | Latest Dollar Volume | Visible Order Book Depth |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--
velo-18.note: Answer returned with six tool calls; stale requested args were normalized to current depth/futures params and all four venue depth snapshots returned.

velo-03.responsePreview: selected_tools_unreachable_or_failing: Iterative execution invoked the selected marketplace tools, but every call failed before any data was returned. The contributor endpoint may be down, returning errors, or rejecting requests. Recent failures: Velo Market Data.list_options_products → Tool Velo Market Data is currently inactive.; Velo Market Data.check_api_status → Tool Velo Market Data is currently inactive.; Velo Market Data.get_available_columns → Tool Velo Market Data is currently inactive
velo-03.note: Not fixed by design; rerun returned capability_miss/tool inactive and remains outside the selected root-cause category.
